stakeholders.Role: Leading financial services group committed to sustainability and responsible banking.

Source metadata.extraction_context: At DBS, we believe that every individual has human rights as enshrined in the United Nations’ Universal Declaration on Human Rights. We also recognise that today the world faces considerable social and human rights challenges that require collaboration between all members of society to overcome.
